facebook.caption:
Walked down Đường Nguyễn Văn Trỗi, almost skipped number 93. Don't be me.

Quán Ăn 93 is a no-frills bistro with 336 reviews and a 4.3-star average. That rating doesn't come from tourists. It comes from people eating here twice.

Find it at 93/185 Đường Nguyễn Văn Trỗi, Khu 2. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Plate after plate landing on the table at Quán Ăn 93. Small spot. Big reputation. 4.3 stars across 336 reviews on a side street most visitors never turn down.

instagram.caption:
Walked past this spot twice. Third time I went in. Quán Ăn 93. 4.3 stars. 336 reviews. Worth the detour.

Tag your travel buddy.
instagram.video_caption: Side street bistro. 336 reviews deep. Quán Ăn 93 earns every one of those stars.

tiktok.caption: Took a wrong turn on Đường Nguyễn Văn Trỗi. Found Quán Ăn 93. 4.3 stars. 336 reviews. You're welcome. #PhuQuoc #PhuQuocFood #TravelTips
